title: Dashboard "Template"?
excerpt: I created a Dashboard that has all of my “to-do’s”, etc.  I’d like all members to have the same Dashboard (for consistency’s sake), but with their items (not mine).  Is there a way to make a Dashboard Template?

posts.author: DougW (Douglas Warner)
posts.cookedHtml: I created a Dashboard that has all of my “to-do’s”, etc. I’d like all members to have the same Dashboard (for consistency’s sake), but with their items (not mine). Is there a way to make a Dashboard Template?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DougW. Sadly, no there is no way to make a template out of a dashboard (to my knowledge). You can easily duplicate a dashboard but no way to rollout as a template similar to a board. I do know this has been put forth as a feature request however I do not have any ETAs at the moment.

Thanks,
Mark
